mapper.select: SELECT DEPT_CD, PRNT_DEPT_CD, DEPT_NM, USE_YN, INTL_TEL_NO, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT FROM DEPARTMENT
SELECT JBGR_CD, JBGR_NM, SORT_ORD, USE_YN, BASE_ANN_LV_DAYS, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT, DEPT_CD FROM JOB_GRADE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER ( USER_ID, USER_ENPSWD, USER_NAME, USER_ENRRNO, USER_GNDR_CD, USER_BRDT, JOIN_DT, USER_TELNO, USER_EMAIL_ADDR, USER_ZIP, USER_ADDR, USER_DADDR, USER_PROFILE, REG_DATE, MOD_DATE, ENABLE, USER_ROLE ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userEnpswd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userEnrrno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userGndrCd, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{userBrdt, jdbcType=DATE}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{userTelno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userEmailAddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userZip, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userDaddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userProfile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, '1', #{userRole, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

INSERT INTO EMPLOYEE_INFO ( USER_ID, DEPT_CD, JBGR_CD, JOIN_YMD, RETMT_YMD, EMPL_STAT_CD, ATCH_FILE_ID, CHRG_DUTY_CN, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptCd, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{jbgrCd, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{joinYmd, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{retmtYmd, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{emplStatCd, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{atchFileId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{chrgDutyCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rgtrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastMdfrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO EMPLOYEE_SALARY ( USER_ID, BASE_SALARY, APPLY_YMD, USE_YN, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{baseSalary, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{applyYmd, jdbcType=DATE}, #{useYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{rgtrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastMdfrId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
